entities.name: TRICHOGRAMMA SPP
entities.description: Egg parasitoids whose response to colored sticky traps was evaluated in the field

entities.name: COLORED STICKY TRAPS
entities.description: Traps consisting of a glass tube coated with Bird-Tanglefoot and colored paper used to catch parasitoids

entities.name: WHITE COLOR
entities.description: A trap color found to be most preferred by female Trichogramma spp.

entities.name: GREEN COLOR
entities.description: A trap color preferred by both male and female Trichogramma spp.

entities.name: BLUE COLOR
entities.description: A trap color tested in the first season

entities.name: YELLOW COLOR
entities.description: A trap color preferred by male Trichogramma spp. and more attractive than black

entities.name: RED COLOR
entities.description: A trap color tested in the first season

entities.name: BLACK COLOR
entities.description: A trap color found to be less attractive than yellow

entities.name: CLEAR TRAPS
entities.description: Traps without colored paper, preferred by female Trichogramma spp. after white

entities.name: VISUAL CUES
entities.description: Sensory information used by Trichogramma spp. during the habitat location process

entities.name: HABITAT LOCATION
entities.description: The process by which Trichogramma spp. find their environment

entities.name: MONITORING
entities.description: The process of tracking Trichogramma spp. populations in the field

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The environment where the response of parasitoids to traps was evaluated
